title: cupressus sempervirens subsp. indica
intro: Cupressus sempervirens subsp. indica, also known as the Italian cypress, is a species of evergreen coniferous tree in the cypress family (Cupressaceae). The medicinal properties of Cupressus sempervirens subsp. indica include its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve respiratory problems, and aid in the treatment of insomnia and digestive issues. In herbal preparations, Cupressus sempervirens subsp. indica is often used in teas, essential oils, and infusions to promote relaxation and improve overall well-being.
